change:
WorldGuessr just got a massive update.

### 🎨 Major Improvements
- Complete redesign of the user interface with a modern, sleek look.
- Leaderboards fully functional including Past Day ELO.
- Better multiplayer reconnect system
- New round over screen for detailed postgame analysis!

### 📈 Revamped Profile Page
- Track your **ELO**, **XP**, and **ranks** over time with beautiful new graphs.
- See your growth, streaks, and slumps in a glance.
- Redesigned layout with better organization of your stats and achievements.

### 🗺️ Better Maps!
- Added support for **panoIds** (more precise control for creators)


Huge thanks to the community for the feedback and ideas that made this update possible 💙

Happy Thanksgiving! WorldGuessr just received a new update.

### ✨ Minor Improvements
- Upgraded Minimap with higher resolution tiles for a sharper and more readable view.
- Faster overall loading times for a smoother gameplay experience.
- Small stability fixes throughout the game.

### 🛡️ Moderation Enhancements
- You can now report suspicious players or inappropriate nicknames directly from your ranked duel history. This feature is rolling out gradually.
- Automatic elo refunds for matches impacted by confirmed cheaters or external googlers.
- Check the newly added **Moderation** section in your profile page to track your reports and check whether you've received any ELO.

WorldGuessr just got a new update!

### ✨ New Ways to Play

* **Daily Challenge** is here! Take on a new adventure every day, chase your best scores, and try to keep your streak alive.

* **Country Guesser** and **Continent Guesser** modes are now available in **singleplayer**, giving casual players an easier way to enjoy WorldGuessr.

### 🛠️ Fixes & Polish

* Fixed various bugs and made several UI improvements across the game to make everything feel smoother.

Thanks for playing WorldGuessr and supporting the game!

**PS: 2v2s are coming soon!**

The wait is over. **2v2 Team Duels are here!**

### ⚔️ 2v2 Team Duels
- Duo up with a friend or get matched with a random partner and battle another team of two.
- Only your team's **best guess** counts each round. Hedge your bets: split up to cover different regions, or lock in together on one spot.

### 🎉 Parties, Rebuilt
- The party lobby got a full overhaul: cleaner, faster, and built for teams.
- Split your party into two teams and battle it out with combined team scores.

### 🐛 Spot a Bug?
- An update this big is bound to have a few rough edges. Report anything weird in our [Discord](https://discord.gg/ADw47GAyS5) and we'll squash it fast.

Thanks for playing WorldGuessr! 💙
